_comment: Conformance fixture 38 — recipe precondition failure handled gracefully. Item carries `text_overlay` (display recipe with precondition: requires_metadata=['lrc_lyrics','lrc_data'] AND applicable_content_types=['song','podcast','narration','movie','lecture']). Item provides NO lrc_lyrics or lrc_data. Engine must skip the recipe (returning a SkippedRecipe with reason='precondition') and fall through to defaults. Tests the precondition-checker's reject path.
name: Precondition Fail Graceful Conformance Fixture
